task_description: Implement foundational infrastructure for the Sleep Audio Pipeline: S3 Input Bucket (encrypted, versioned, EventBridge-enabled), S3 Output Bucket (encrypted, versioned), and EventBridge Rule triggered on Object Created events from the Input Bucket. Follow strict TDD with tests first.

verification.summary: All 5 tests pass (0 failures). cdk synth succeeds. Review feedback addressed: LogGroup now has 7-day retention and DESTROY removal policy; tests distinguish input bucket via Custom::S3BucketNotifications; EventBridge rule test verifies detail.bucket.name constraint; new test verifies BucketPolicy SSL enforcement.
